---
title: "Martry! by Kaveh Akbar - Review"
---

This book was interesting at the beginning, slow in the middle, and really interesting at the end. It was sad throughout as it follows a main character grappling with many different forms of loss. It is a good insight into the life of an immigrant in America, especially from the Middle East. I really enjoyed the twist at the end, aand think it was an interesting read.
